name: Surprise-Crust Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Spray a 12-inch round pizza pan with nonstick cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, stir together rice, Parmesan cheese, and egg. Press firmly into the prepared pizza pan to form a "crust". Bake for 20 minutes.
4. Spray a large nonstick skillet with nonstick cooking spray. Add onion and pepper and stir-fry until tender, about 5 minutes. Stir in sliced mushrooms and minced garlic and cook until mushrooms are browned, 5-8 minutes.
5. Arrange the vegetable mixture over the baked rice "crust". Spread tomato sauce evenly over the pie. Sprinkle with oregano, fennel seeds (if desired), and mozzarella cheese.
6. Bake for 10-15 minutes or until the cheese is bubbling and browned. Cut into 8 wedges.
Each serving (2 wedges) provides:
2-1/2 V, 2 P, 1/2 B, 10 C
Per serving:
369 cal, 17 g pro, 54 g carb,
9 g fat: 1 g poly, 2 g mono, 5 g sat
275 mg sod, 76 mg chol
